svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="任务图事实源" id="wf3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-609" dy="-177" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="json" parent="1" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="任务图 JSON（唯一事实源）
所有 agent 只信这一份" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="230" x="470" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="T-000 订单 schema
layer: data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="120" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="T-001 订单详情接口
layer: backend · depends: T-000" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="230" x="470" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="T-002 订单详情页
layer: frontend · depends: T-001" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="840" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep01" edge="1" parent="1" source="t0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep12" edge="1" parent="1" source="t1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r0" edge="1" parent="1" source="json" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;dashed=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t0" value="读取 / 领取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" edge="1" parent="1" source="json" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;dashed=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t1" value="读取 / 领取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" edge="1" parent="1" source="json" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;dashed=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t2" value="读取 / 领取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;dashed=1;" value="agent A
后端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="100" x="500" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;dashed=1;" value="agent B
前端（阻塞，等 T-001）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="830" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;dashed=1;" value="agent C
数据层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="100" x="150" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claim0" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claim1" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;" target="t1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="status" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="状态流转只写回 JSON：todo → doing → done
agent 不得自行声称「我做完了」，以 JSON 为准" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="300" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
